data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses microservices to provide scalability and maintainability, allowing different components to be updated without affecting the whole system.

data.title: Event-Driven Systems
data.description: Spotify utilizes event-driven architectures to handle data changes across its platform efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka for stream processing and messaging.

data.title: Data Storage Solutions
data.description: Spotify employs a mix of SQL and NoSQL databases to manage diverse data types.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Spotify uses CDNs to deliver media content efficiently to users around the globe.
data.technical_spec: Akamai technologies for global cache distribution.

data.title: Mobile and Web Front-End
data.description: Adopts responsive design principles and native mobile solutions for a seamless user experience.
data.technical_spec: React for web, native iOS and Android development.
